name: codex-video-director-skill
description: An agentic Codex skill for turning factual timelines and product histories into cinematic coded videos.

scripts.remotion:compositions: remotion compositions case-studies/iphone-evolution/remotion/index.tsx && remotion compositions case-studies/spacex-ascent/remotion/index.tsx && remotion compositions case-studies/ai-interface-futures/remotion/index.tsx
scripts.render:remotion-stills: remotion still case-studies/iphone-evolution/remotion/index.tsx iphone-evolution case-studies/iphone-evolution/remotion/renders/frame-30.png --frame=30 --scale=0.25 && remotion still case-studies/spacex-ascent/remotion/index.tsx spacex-ascent case-studies/spacex-ascent/remotion/renders/frame-30.png --frame=30 --scale=0.25 && remotion still case-studies/ai-interface-futures/remotion/index.tsx ai-interface-futures case-studies/ai-interface-futures/remotion/renders/frame-30.png --frame=30 --scale=0.25
